truck_info.title: My Current Truck
truck_info.description: Fast summary of the active truck loaded from the current save.
truck_info.summary: Brand, model and odometer from the active save.
truck_info.loading_body: Reading the active truck from the active save.
truck_info.error_body: The current truck could not be loaded.
truck_info.empty_body: Load a valid save or quicksave to view the active truck.

level_system.title: Level & XP System
level_system.description: Choose a target level visually, preview the matching XP values and keep the save state consistent.

feedback.level_clamped: Level adjusted to the supported range {min}-{max}.
feedback.xp_clamped: XP adjusted to the supported range 0-{maxXp}.

mod_conflict_diagnostics.title: Mod Conflict Analyzer
mod_conflict_diagnostics.description: Analyze crash logs, missing references and local mods without pretending to prove every culprit.
mod_conflict_diagnostics.loading_body: Reading game.log.txt, game.crash.txt and indexing local mod files.
mod_conflict_diagnostics.error_body: The diagnostics report could not be created.
mod_conflict_diagnostics.empty_body: The analyzer did not find enough evidence to build a useful report.

content.no_broken_references: No broken references were isolated from the current save and logs.
content.no_missing_references: No missing or removed references detected.
content.no_timeline: No timeline could be created from the current evidence.
content.no_critical_errors: No recent critical error chain could be extracted.
content.no_crash_context: No crash context lines were captured.
content.no_save_health_details: No additional save-health details were isolated.
content.removed_suspected: Potential removed mod or stale save reference.
content.no_mod_assigned: No mod could be confidently assigned.

mod_profile_manager.title: Mod Profile Manager
mod_profile_manager.description: Create, compare and restore mod setups for ETS2/ATS.
mod_profile_manager.loading_title: Scanning local mods and workshop folders
mod_profile_manager.loading_body: Reading local mod directories, Steam libraries and saved presets.
mod_profile_manager.error_body: The Mod Profile Manager could not load the requested data.
mod_profile_manager.empty_body: The manager did not find local mods or saved presets yet.

content.manager_still_works: Local mod scanning still works without Steam Workshop.
content.active_list_detected: Active mods and load order were read from profile.sii.
content.active_list_estimated: Active mods are not directly available. The displayed load order is estimated from the local scan.
content.active_list_unknown: Active mods and load order are not reliably available for this scan.
content.no_mods_found: No mods match the current filters.
content.no_presets: No presets saved for this game.
content.no_compare: Select a preset to compare it with the current local setup.
content.restore_not_implemented: Automatic activation is not implemented yet for this profile format.
content.preset_creation_estimated: The current active mod list is not directly available. Saving will use the detected local inventory with an estimated load order.
content.preset_creation_unknown: The current active mod list is not available. Saving will store the current scan result as-is.
content.preset_creation_requires_profile: Preset creation needs a profile with readable profile.sii so the active mod list can be detected.
content.preset_creation_ready: The current active mod list is available. Saving the current setup will store the active mods and detected load order.

profile_sharing.title: Profile Sharing
profile_sharing.description: Export the selected profile as a shareable ZIP archive and prepare incoming archives for import.
profile_sharing.description_import: Select a ZIP archive and import it into the ETS2 or ATS profile folder.
profile_sharing.description_export: Select a destination folder and export the currently selected profile as a ZIP archive.
profile_sharing.status_ready_message: Prepare the selected profile for sharing or inspect a received ZIP archive before importing it.
profile_sharing.status_ready_import: Select a ZIP archive, review the detected profile and then start the import.
profile_sharing.status_ready_export: Verify the selected profile and export folder, then create the ZIP archive.
profile_sharing.experimental_copy: Import and export are currently in a test phase. Please validate created archives before sharing them.
profile_sharing.mode_hint_import: The selected ZIP archive is validated first and then imported into the resolved game profile path.
profile_sharing.mode_hint_export: The selected profile is packaged as a ZIP archive in the chosen destination folder.
profile_sharing.export_body: Prepare the selected profile as a clean archive for Discord or direct sharing.
profile_sharing.export_progress: The selected profile is currently being packaged as a ZIP archive.
profile_sharing.export_done: ZIP archive created successfully with {fileCount} exported files.
profile_sharing.export_hint: Choose a destination folder. The profile is exported as a ZIP archive and the original save files are not modified.
profile_sharing.import_body: Paste the ZIP path you received and optionally override the profile name before importing.
profile_sharing.import_progress: The shared profile archive is currently being validated and imported.
profile_sharing.import_hint: Choose a ZIP archive to validate the profile structure before importing it.
profile_sharing.import_conflict_message: A profile with the requested name already exists. The import will use {profileName} instead.
